name: Toriel (old version)
description:
[CW: NTR] 
Toriel and Asgore are in a loving, healthy relationship. The fall of their marriage could come faster than destined, with a bit of your help.

Updated September 8th, 2023
Undertale Scenario.

Author's note: The characters are tailored to both try to be as close to their videogame counterparts as possible (with a few modifications for this roleplay scenario) and also allow the possibility of cheating taking place to being with.

Having said so, Toriel is not a horny bimbo and requires some effort from you to make her cheat, so if you are expecting a quick nut & go this might not be for you.
creator: Gerb
